channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned fridge freezer outside number 14, 24th March
item.description:
Fridge freezer left outside for several days. Broken parts now spread across pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cantwell Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in children’s playground., 24th March
item.description:
Range of grafitti in playground - some offensive - that has been here some time

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Slade, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin causing litter everywhere, 24th March
item.description:
The bin is overflowing, litter is spreading around the street, has probably been made worse by foxes. Nappies, dog waste bags etc all over the pavement right near a primary school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adys Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 24th March
item.description:
Bin is full and overflowing with poo bags and general litter. Spilling out onto the floor
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weight limit on Siward and Godwin road, 24th March
item.description:
There has always been a 10 ton limit on these two roads ever since we have lived here(around 50 years)it was removed several years ago and since then lorries and and waste collection vehicles use this as a regular short cut and at high speeds (waste collection vehicles can only use these roads on collection days) please on behalf of all the residents of these roads please replace the 10 ton limit sign at the junction of Siward Road and Wendover road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Siward Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 24th March
item.description:
This has been dumped outside our factory entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped household waste, 24th March
item.description:
Corner of Sutherland Road and Findon Road N9. This corner is regularly used to dump rubbish and furniture.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sutherland Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged cycle lane protection, 24th March
item.description:
London Bridge, southbound lanes. The first 'armadillo' is not correctly secured and therefore gets turned when vehicle wheels run over it presenting a serious hazard to cyclists. Additionally this armadillo and the following two have all had their wands removed adding a further hazard as visibility is reduced. Some of the wands are laying in the gutter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): London Bridge, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pathway from Oliver Tambo to Bounds Green is in very poor and dangerous condition, 24th March
item.description:
The pathway has been in poor condition for a number of years having been badly repaired a number of years ago in a patchwork fashion. The current state of the path is a hazard to pedestrians with numerous potholes and broken sections which require investigation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durnsford Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of builders/household waste, 24th March
item.description:
Discovered this morning.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dogshyte on the pavement halfway down Kenning Street outside Rye Hoyse, 24th March
item.description:
Lazy scum bags not picking up their dog’s mess. Please prosecute them. Happens avery day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-20, Swan Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green Jeep parked on pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Untaxed andUn MOTd car parked on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Green Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent waste left uncollected, 24th March
item.description:
The waste accumulation is continuing despite multiple reports and the area is left dirty with food waste spread everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106,108,110, Bermondsey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 24th March
item.description:
Written off vehicle dumped opposite Astbury road business park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been overflowing, 24th March
item.description:
Been overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Dale, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement issue road issue, 24th March
item.description:
Curb stones all removed - bollards in place needs repair
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heath Drive, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on grass next to pavement, 24th March
item.description:
Dead fox on corner of Carlton Road and Carlton Road spur. On grass verge next to pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Place, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti opposite my house, 24th March
item.description:
Hi, there are 4 items of graffiti which have appeared over the last few days on the walls opposite 241 Worsley bridge road and one is on the bus shelter. Could these please be removed as soon as possible. Many thanks Mr Anthony Chilver

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 24th March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carnarvon Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Litter along the roads in the area of the Dr surgery, 24th March
item.description:
Litter in the area
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushet Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
